title: SAO Weapons
description: This resourcepack which adds weapons from the Sword Art Online anime
body:
![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e67658729b16559f9208c46fef93dab736de32a3.png)

# This resourcepack adds some swords from the Sword Art Online anime.

Currently only Divine items are available, also Elucidator and Dark Repulser. There are a totaly 8 items in the resourcepack.

[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.20.1_HD_U_I6.jar&x=fda0) or [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) is **required** for the resource pack to work! All items can be obtained by renaming any of the swords.
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a064377f93bbe0b38ab4ffc85997d62d2fc11fd9.png)

### List of available renamings: 
- Time Piercing Sword
- Heaven Piercing Sword
- Fragrant Olive Sword
- Blue Rose Sword
- Night Sky Sword
- Black Lily Sword
- Elucidator
- Dark Repulser

**You can check them out in the gallery.**
